description: CRTX Governance Policy — domains requiring mandatory human escalation. Agents may NOT autonomously approve changes in these domains.
escalationRule: Any change touching the above domains must be flagged to the human orchestrator and blocked until explicit approval is received.

forbidden: Assigning a task directly to a model (e.g. 'owner: claude')
Assuming a specific IDE or agent framework
Hardcoding provider names in task definitions
Nested subagent chains deeper than 1 level

runtimeCompatibility.requirement: Any runtime may participate if it can: (1) receive a task, (2) execute work, (3) return a result.
runtimeCompatibility.preference: Always prefer open integration over vendor lock-in.
